1.0.0.en: Initial release. Monitor and control HPE servers via iLO 5/6 (Redfish): power on/off (graceful shutdown), power consumption, inlet and CPU temperature, fan speed, and health status, with Flow cards for power control and health alerts.

1.0.1.en: Added tags for Homey app store

1.1.0.en: The power tile is now read only to prevent accidental shutdowns of a server
